highlights: Early morning boat tours departing around 5-6 AM to see trading activity on the Mekong River
Fresh pho and coffee served on boats during the tour with scenic sunrise views
Wooden boats selling fresh fruits, local crafts, and traditional noodles directly from water

thingsToKnow.crowds: Market is now primarily tourist-oriented with mostly tourist boats rather than traditional market activity. Busiest between 5-7 AM, then becomes quieter.
thingsToKnow.safety: Water pollution and garbage disposal issues reported in the river area. Ensure boat operators follow safety protocols.
thingsToKnow.seasonal: Visit during cooler morning hours to avoid sweltering midday sun. January visits coincide with Tet celebrations and increased crowds.

visitorTips: Book directly from harbor ticket booths in Can Tho (300k-500k VND per person shared boat) rather than hotels to avoid inflated prices
Arrive by 5:30 AM for better views of trading activity; waiting until 7 AM means fewer boats and less activity
Expect a declining traditional market; most activity is now tourist-focused refreshment services rather than wholesale trading

faq.question: Is it worth waking up at 5 AM for this market?
faq.answer: Yes, early arrival (5-6 AM) shows more trading activity and cooler temperatures. Arriving at 7 AM or later significantly reduces market activity and boat visibility.

faq.question: What is the actual cost of a floating market tour?
faq.answer: Shared boats: 300k-500k VND per person. Private boats: 500k-700k VND for 3 hours. Book directly at Can Tho harbor to avoid hotel markups of 1.5 million VND.

faq.question: Is this a real market or just for tourists?
faq.answer: It is now primarily tourist-focused. Once 15 floating markets existed; only 1 remains. Government subsidizes it to preserve tradition. Real wholesale trading has largely moved to land.

sentiment.positive: Many travelers find it a worthwhile cultural experience despite its tourist-oriented nature, especially when guided by knowledgeable local tour guides and enjoying fresh food on the water at sunrise
sentiment.negative: Significant disappointment with expectations versus reality: promotional photos show outdated market scenes; water pollution and garbage disposal problems; market has declined dramatically in size and authentic trading activity
